extra.raw_arguments:
{"cmd":"python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')
task=pd.read_csv('/app/task_001.csv')
assign=read('task_assignment')
review=read('code_review')
appr=read('approval')
dep=read('task_dependency')
event=read('task_event')
meet=pd.read_csv('/app/meeting_001.csv'); mp=read('meeting_participant'); msg=read('message_metadata')
for df, cols in [(task,['created_at','completed_at']),(assign,['assigned_at','unassigned_at']),(review,['requested_at','completed_at']),(appr,['requested_at','resolved_at']),(dep,['created_at','resolved_at']),(event,['timestamp']),(meet,['start_time','end_time']),(msg,['timestamp'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x: t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
assign['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(assign.assigned_at,assign.unassigned_at)]
task['task_wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(task.created_at,task.completed_at)]
review['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(review.requested_at,review.completed_at)]
appr['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(appr.requested_at,appr.resolved_at)]
dep['dep_wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(dep.created_at,dep.resolved_at)]
meet['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(meet.start_time,meet.end_time)]

# role quantiles to label
roleq=assign.groupby('assignment_role').wh.quantile([.5,.9,.95,.99]).unstack()
roleq.columns=['q50','q90','q95','q99']
print('role quantiles')
print(roleq.round(2).to_string())

for eid in [282,213,237,317,29,264,27,241,207,193,44,39,11,82,220,246,325,280]:
    print('\n===== EMP', eid, emp[emp.employee_id==eid][['role','seniority_level','department','manager_id']].to_string(index=False))
    a=assign[assign.employee_id==eid].merge(task[['task_id','task_type','priority','complexity_score','risk_score','status','task_wh']],on='task_id')
    summ=a.groupby('assignment_role').wh.agg(['count','mean','median','sum','max']).round(2)
    print('summary\n'+summ.to_string())
    # count assignments over role q95 / q99
    aa=a.join(roleq, on='assignment_role')
    print('over q95/q99', int((aa.wh>=aa.q95).sum()), int((aa.wh>=aa.q99).sum()), 'total stage wh', round(a.wh.sum(),2))
    print('top long assignments')
    print(a.sort_values('wh',ascending=False).head(6)[['task_id','assignment_role','wh','task_type','priority','complexity_score','risk_score','task_wh','status']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    # review/approval info
    rev=review[review.reviewer_id==eid]
    if len(rev):
        print('review n mean med max q95cnt q99cnt:', len(rev), round(rev.wh.mean(),2), round(rev.wh.median(),2), round(rev.wh.max(),2), int((rev.wh>=review.wh.quantile(.95)).sum()), int((rev.wh>=review.wh.quantile(.99)).sum()))
        print(rev.sort_values('wh',ascending=False).head(4)[['task_id','wh','review_outcome','requested_changes_count']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    app=appr[appr.approver_id==eid]
    if len(app):
        print('approval n mean med max q95cnt q99cnt:', len(app), round(app.wh.mean(),2), round(app.wh.median(),2), round(app.wh.max(),2), int((app.wh>=appr.wh.quantile(.95)).sum()), int((app.wh>=appr.wh.quantile(.99)).sum()))
        print(app.sort_values('wh',ascending=False).head(4)[['task_id','wh','approval_type','approval_result']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    # quality author
    auth=review[review.author_id==eid]
    if len(auth):
        print('as author reviews/change_req/avg_changes:', len(auth), int((auth.review_outcome=='changes_requested').sum()), round(auth.requested_changes_count.mean(),2), int(auth.requested_changes_count.sum()))
    # dependencies: block parent where this employee had long work role > q95 or any top assignments
    top_tasks=a.sort_values('wh',ascending=False).head(6).task_id.tolist()
    d2=dep[dep.blocking_task_id.isin(top_tasks)].merge(task[['task_id','task_type','task_wh']], left_on='blocking_task_id', right_on='task_id')
    if len(d2):
        print('top assignments that block parent deps')
        print(d2[['blocking_task_id','blocked_task_id','dep_wh','task_type','task_wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    d1=dep[dep.blocked_task_id.isin(top_tasks)]
    if len(d1):
        print('top assignments that are blocked parents')
        print(d1.sort_values('dep_wh',ascending=False).head(8)[['blocked_task_id','blocking_task_id','dep_wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    # workload rankings summary
    mh=mp.merge(meet[['meeting_id','wh']],on='meeting_id')
    mwh=mh[mh.employee_id==eid].wh.sum(); mc=len(mh[mh.employee_id==eid])
    msgs=int((msg.sender_id.eq(eid)|msg.receiver_id.eq(eid)).sum())
    print('workload meetings_count wh messages', mc, round(mwh,2), msgs)
PY","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":120000}

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')
meet=pd.read_csv('/app/meeting_001.csv'); mp=read('meeting_participant')
msg=read('message_metadata')
for df, cols in [(meet,['start_time','end_time']),(msg,['timestamp'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x: t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
meet['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(meet.start_time,meet.end_time)]
mh=mp.merge(meet[['meeting_id','wh','organizer_id','meeting_type']],on='meeting_id')
meet_g=mh.groupby('employee_id').agg(meetings=('meeting_id','count'),meet_wh=('wh','sum'),avg=('wh','mean')).reset_index()
msg_g=pd.concat([msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('sent'),msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('recv')],axis=1).fillna(0).astype(int).reset_index().rename(columns={'index':'employee_id'})
msg_g['messages']=msg_g.sent+msg_g.recv
w=emp.merge(meet_g,on='employee_id',how='left').merge(msg_g,on='employee_id',how='left').fillna(0)
print('meeting stats q', w.meet_wh.quantile([.5,.75,.9,.95,.99]).to_dict())
print(w.sort_values('meet_wh',ascending=False).head(50).round(2).to_string(index=False))
print('\nmessage stats q', w.messages.quantile([.5,.75,.9,.95,.99]).to_dict())
print(w.sort_values('messages',ascending=False).head(50).to_string(index=False))
# combine workload score z
for col in ['meet_wh','messages','meetings']:
    w[col+'_z']=(w[col]-w[col].mean())/w[col].std()
w['workload_z']=w[['meet_wh_z','messages_z']].sum(axis=1)
print('\ncombined workload')
print(w.sort_values('workload_z',ascending=False).head(50).round(2).to_string(index=False))
PY

{"cmd":"python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')
meet=pd.read_csv('/app/meeting_001.csv'); mp=read('meeting_participant')
msg=read('message_metadata')
for df, cols in [(meet,['start_time','end_time']),(msg,['timestamp'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x: t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
meet['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(meet.start_time,meet.end_time)]
mh=mp.merge(meet[['meeting_id','wh','organizer_id','meeting_type']],on='meeting_id')
meet_g=mh.groupby('employee_id').agg(meetings=('meeting_id','count'),meet_wh=('wh','sum'),avg=('wh','mean')).reset_index()
msg_g=pd.concat([msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('sent'),msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('recv')],axis=1).fillna(0).astype(int).reset_index().rename(columns={'index':'employee_id'})
msg_g['messages']=msg_g.sent+msg_g.recv
w=emp.merge(meet_g,on='employee_id',how='left').merge(msg_g,on='employee_id',how='left').fillna(0)
print('meeting stats q', w.meet_wh.quantile([.5,.75,.9,.95,.99]).to_dict())
print(w.sort_values('meet_wh',ascending=False).head(50).round(2).to_string(index=False))
print('\nmessage stats q', w.messages.quantile([.5,.75,.9,.95,.99]).to_dict())
print(w.sort_values('messages',ascending=False).head(50).to_string(index=False))
# combine workload score z
for col in ['meet_wh','messages','meetings']:
    w[col+'_z']=(w[col]-w[col].mean())/w[col].std()
w['workload_z']=w[['meet_wh_z','messages_z']].sum(axis=1)
print('\ncombined workload')
print(w.sort_values('workload_z',ascending=False).head(50).round(2).to_string(index=False))
PY","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}

steps.message: High workload alone is not enough: employee 228 has the most meeting time, for example, but the question asks for employees delaying work. I’m cross-checking top workload people against actual stage turnaround before deciding whether to include any workload-only candidate.

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')
assign=read('task_assignment'); task=pd.read_csv('/app/task_001.csv'); review=read('code_review'); appr=read('approval')
meet=pd.read_csv('/app/meeting_001.csv'); mp=read('meeting_participant'); msg=read('message_metadata')
for df, cols in [(assign,['assigned_at','unassigned_at']),(review,['requested_at','completed_at']),(appr,['requested_at','resolved_at']),(task,['created_at','completed_at']),(meet,['start_time','end_time']),(msg,['timestamp'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x:t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
assign['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(assign.assigned_at,assign.unassigned_at)]
review['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(review.requested_at,review.completed_at)]
appr['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(appr.requested_at,appr.resolved_at)]
meet['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(meet.start_time,meet.end_time)]
task['task_wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(task.created_at,task.completed_at)]
roleq=assign.groupby('assignment_role').wh.quantile([.95,.99]).unstack(); roleq.columns=['q95','q99']
# employee assignment excess95 and extreme counts
sc=[]
for role, sub in assign.groupby('assignment_role'):
    q95=sub.wh.quantile(.95); q99=sub.wh.quantile(.99)
    temp=sub.copy(); temp['excess95']=(temp.wh-q95).clip(lower=0); temp['gt95']=temp.wh>=q95; temp['gt99']=temp.wh>=q99
    g=temp.groupby('employee_id').agg(assign_n=('wh','count'),stage_wh=('wh','sum'),excess95=('excess95','sum'),gt95=('gt95','sum'),gt99=('gt99','sum')).reset_index()
    sc.append(g)
sg=pd.concat(sc).groupby('employee_id').sum().reset_index()
# review approval excess separate
for name,df,idcol in [('rev',review,'reviewer_id'),('app',appr,'approver_id')]:
    q95=df.wh.quantile(.95); q99=df.wh.quantile(.99)
    tmp=df.copy(); tmp['excess']=(tmp.wh-q95).clip(lower=0); tmp['gt95']=tmp.wh>=q95; tmp['gt99']=tmp.wh>=q99
    g=tmp.groupby(idcol).agg(**{f'{name}_n':('wh','count'),f'{name}_wh':('wh','sum'),f'{name}_excess95':('excess','sum'),f'{name}_gt95':('gt95','sum'),f'{name}_gt99':('gt99','sum')}).reset_index().rename(columns={idcol:'employee_id'})
    sg=sg.merge(g,on='employee_id',how='outer')
sg=sg.fillna(0)
# workload
mh=mp.merge(meet[['meeting_id','wh']],on='meeting_id')
meet_g=mh.groupby('employee_id').agg(meetings=('meeting_id','count'),meet_wh=('wh','sum')).reset_index()
msg_g=pd.concat([msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('sent'),msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('recv')],axis=1).fillna(0).astype(int).reset_index().rename(columns={'index':'employee_id'}); msg_g['messages']=msg_g.sent+msg_g.recv
sg=sg.merge(emp,on='employee_id').merge(meet_g,on='employee_id',how='left').merge(msg_g[['employee_id','messages']],on='employee_id',how='left').fillna(0)
sg['total_excess95']=sg.excess95+sg.rev_excess95+sg.app_excess95
# top workload list and their delay ranks
work_ids=[228,317,273,25,298,302,100,259,57,173,205,51,40,261,210,73,249,122,260,327,281,282,204,74,45,325]
print(sg[sg.employee_id.isin(work_ids)].sort_values('meet_wh',ascending=False)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','department','assign_n','stage_wh','excess95','gt95','gt99','rev_excess95','app_excess95','total_excess95','meetings','meet_wh','messages']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
print('\nTop total_excess with workload')
print(sg.sort_values('total_excess95',ascending=False).head(40)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','department','assign_n','stage_wh','excess95','gt95','gt99','rev_excess95','rev_gt95','rev_gt99','app_excess95','app_gt95','app_gt99','total_excess95','meetings','meet_wh','messages']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
PY

import pandas as pd, glob

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv'); task=pd.read_csv('/app/task_001.csv'); assign=read('task_assignment'); event=read('task_event'); review=read('code_review'); qa=read('qa_test'); dep=read('task_dependency')
for df, cols in [(task,['created_at','completed_at']),(assign,['assigned_at','unassigned_at']),(event,['timestamp']),(review,['requested_at','completed_at']),(qa,['tested_at']),(dep,['created_at','resolved_at'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x:t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
assign['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(assign.assigned_at,assign.unassigned_at)]
task['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(task.created_at,task.completed_at)]
review['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(review.requested_at,review.completed_at)]
dep['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(dep.created_at,dep.resolved_at)]
for tid in [119,117,136,135,2237,2236,705,993,865,2172,3010,1245]:
    print('\n=== task',tid)
    print(task[task.task_id==tid].to_string(index=False))
    print('assignments')
    print(assign[assign.task_id==tid].merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','department']],on='employee_id').sort_values('assigned_at')[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','assignment_role','assigned_at','unassigned_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    print('events')
    print(event[event.task_id==tid].sort_values('timestamp')[['employee_id','event_type','timestamp']].to_string(index=False))
    if len(review[review.task_id==tid]):
        print('reviews')
        print(review[review.task_id==tid][['reviewer_id','author_id','review_outcome','requested_changes_count','requested_at','completed_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    print('deps blocked by task')

extra.raw_arguments:
{"cmd":"python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob

def read(name): return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{name}_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
emp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv'); task=pd.read_csv('/app/task_001.csv'); assign=read('task_assignment'); event=read('task_event'); review=read('code_review'); qa=read('qa_test'); dep=read('task_dependency')
for df, cols in [(task,['created_at','completed_at']),(assign,['assigned_at','unassigned_at']),(event,['timestamp']),(review,['requested_at','completed_at']),(qa,['tested_at']),(dep,['created_at','resolved_at'])]:
    for c in cols: df[c]=pd.to_datetime(df[c])
def wh(a,b):
    t=0.; d=a.normalize(); ed=b.normalize()
    while d<=ed:
        x=max(a,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=9)); y=min(b,d+pd.Timedelta(hours=17))
        if y>x:t+=(y-x).total_seconds()/3600
        d+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)
    return t
assign['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(assign.assigned_at,assign.unassigned_at)]
task['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(task.created_at,task.completed_at)]
review['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(review.requested_at,review.completed_at)]
dep['wh']=[wh(a,b) for a,b in zip(dep.created_at,dep.resolved_at)]
for tid in [119,117,136,135,2237,2236,705,993,865,2172,3010,1245]:
    print('\n=== task',tid)
    print(task[task.task_id==tid].to_string(index=False))
    print('assignments')
    print(assign[assign.task_id==tid].merge(emp[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','department']],on='employee_id').sort_values('assigned_at')[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','assignment_role','assigned_at','unassigned_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    print('events')
    print(event[event.task_id==tid].sort_values('timestamp')[['employee_id','event_type','timestamp']].to_string(index=False))
    if len(review[review.task_id==tid]):
        print('reviews')
        print(review[review.task_id==tid][['reviewer_id','author_id','review_outcome','requested_changes_count','requested_at','completed_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    print('deps blocked by task')
    print(dep[dep.blocked_task_id==tid][['dependency_id','blocking_task_id','created_at','resolved_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
    print('deps task blocks')
    print(dep[dep.blocking_task_id==tid][['dependency_id','blocked_task_id','created_at','resolved_at','wh']].round(2).to_string(index=False))
PY","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}

I’m writing the answer file with those employee IDs only, excluding people who were merely high-workload without corresponding delay.
